title: Daemon Event Envelope
description: Standard envelope for all events pushed by agent-os daemons to subscribers. Newline-delimited JSON (ndjson) over Unix socket.

v.description: Envelope version. Integer, not semver. Bump only on breaking wire changes.

event.description: Event name. Snake_case, service-specific. Examples: cursor_moved, canvas_message, channel_post.

data.description: Event-specific payload. Structure depends on service + event name. Always an object, never null.

ref.description: Optional correlation ID. Links an event to a prior request (e.g. a perception channel open).

Bounds.description: Reuse shared Bounds type (x, y, width, height).
